## 📝 变更描述 / Change Description

<!-- 简要描述这个 PR 做了什么改动 -->
<!-- Briefly describe what changes this PR makes -->

Fixes #(issue number) / 关联的 Issue

## 🏷️ 变更类型 / Type of Change

<!-- 请勾选适用的选项 / Please check the applicable options: -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug 修复 / Bug fix (修复问题 / fix that resolves an issue)
- [ ] ✨ 新功能 / New feature (新增功能 / adds functionality)
- [ ] 📝 文档更新 / Documentation (更新文档 / documentation changes)
- [ ] 🎨 代码风格 / Code style (格式调整，不影响功能 / formatting, no functional change)
- [ ] ♻️ 代码重构 / Refactoring (重构代码，不添加新功能 / refactoring code)
- [ ] ⚡ 性能优化 / Performance (性能提升 / performance improvement)
- [ ] ✅ 测试相关 / Tests (添加或修改测试 / adding or modifying tests)
- [ ] 🔧 构建/工具 / Build/Tools (构建或辅助工具变动 / build or auxiliary tool changes)

## 🧪 测试清单 / Testing Checklist

<!-- 请确认你已完成以下检查 / Please confirm you have completed the following checks: -->

- [ ] 本地测试通过 / Local testing passed
- [ ] 相关文档已更新 / Related documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] 代码符合项目规范 / Code follows project guidelines
- [ ] 提交信息符合规范 / Commit messages follow conventions

### 测试详情 / Testing Details

<!-- 描述你如何测试这些改动 -->
<!-- Describe how you tested these changes -->

```bash
# 如果适用，请提供测试命令 / If applicable, provide test commands:
./setup.sh
# 或者其他测试步骤 / or other test steps
```

## 📸 截图 / Screenshots

如果适用，添加截图展示改动效果。
直接拖拽图片到编辑器即可上传。

Drag and drop images directly into the editor to upload.
-->

## ⚠️ 破坏性变更 / Breaking Changes

<!-- 
这个 PR 是否包含破坏性变更？
如果有，请描述影响以及迁移步骤。

Does this PR contain breaking changes?
If so, describe the impact and migration steps.
-->

- [ ] 否 / No
- [ ] 是 / Yes

如果是，请说明 / If yes, please explain:

## ✅ 提交前检查 / Pre-Submission Checklist

- [ ] 我的 PR 只解决一个问题 / My PR addresses only one issue
- [ ] 我已经阅读了贡献指南 / I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] 我的代码遵循项目规范 / My code follows the project guidelines
- [ ] 我添加了适当的注释（如果需要）/ I have added appropriate comments (if needed)

## 👥 审核者注意 / For Reviewers

<!-- 
如果审核者需要特别注意某些地方，请在这里说明。

感谢你的贡献！/ Thank you for your contribution!
